Buying a Property

  • Home
  • /
  • Services
  • /
  • Buying

We help you find the home that's right for you.

Buying a property is one of the most important decisions of your life. We listen carefully to what you're looking for — area, size, budget — and only put forward properties that genuinely make sense for you, right across Thessaloniki.

We arrange the viewings, give you an honest picture of every property, and handle the negotiation and the coordination of the legal and technical due diligence, all the way to the signing of the notarial deed.

Personal search

A shortlist of properties based on what you're really after.

Viewings & selection

Well-organised viewings, with no time wasted.

Due diligence & deed

Coordination of the legal and technical checks through to signing.

What you gain.

Personal guidance, local knowledge and transparency at every step.

  • Access to properties before they hit the market
  • A realistic view of prices backed by market data
  • Negotiation in experienced hands
  • One person by your side, from start to finish
Start your search

  • Renting
  • Selling
  • Valuation
  • Renovation
  • Property Management

Have questions?
Let's talk.
